mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_USER_ID
INSERT INTO TB_COM_USER_M ( USER_ID , EMIL , PSWD , NK_NM , SNS_ID , SNS_DVCD , REG_ID , REG_DTM , CHNG_ID , CHNG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{emil} , #{pswd} , #{nkNm} , #{snsId} , #{snsDvcd} , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) )
